rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (OOD robustness claims) but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
